name: mb-product-intelligence
description: Ministry Brands Product Intelligence Plugin. Three skills for product teams: the Knowledgebase Maker (builds a two-page product knowledgebase, a Snapshot dashboard plus a Product Bible deep reference, from a guided interview and live product walkthrough), the Knowledgebase Assistant (helps you query, update, audit, and walk KB Integrity against specific tasks), and the Persona Maker (creates data-informed user personas with gap analysis and validation guides). All KBs save to the MB DesignOps Confluence template at https://ministrybrands.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DR/pages/6534463521/Product+Knowledge+Base+Template.
